title: RISF Pack of 32 Rattle Tins Rattle Balls and Cuddly Toys Squeaker for Sewing in Set, Cute Squealer Toy, Crinkle Film for Sewing, Crinkle Film for Dogs, Pets, Baby Toy, Noise Maker
features: Package contents: baby rattle include 8 pieces 1.7 cm / 0.67 inch clear bells, 8 pieces 2.4 cm / 0.95 inch white bells, 8 pieces 2.7 cm / 1.05 clear squeaky toys and 8 pieces 1.5 cm / 0.6 inch wave box. The set can meet your different needs.

Durable material: the squeaker for sewing, the rattle ball and the box are made of high-quality EVA material. These materials make the toys durable and ensure that they are not damaged, deformed or discoloured over time.

Rattle box: Our squealer squeaky rattle can be used to repair plush toys to make them sound again, and can also be sewn into baby toys, crochet rattles, soft toys, animal toys, teddy bears, dolls or other sewing items.

Easy to use: Our sew-in crackle film is cleverly integrated into the design of children's toys, just a gentle pressure, the pleasant sound will play, not only provides auditory stimulation for babies, but also trains their listening ability during play. Meanwhile, for pets, this is a good choice to attract their attention and increase interactive fun.

Wide range of uses: Crinkle foil as a versatile tool for sewing baby rattles, dolls, plush toys, animal toys and preschool supplies. The rattle ball attracts baby's attention with its gentle sound and relieves crying. The rattle ball is an ideal companion for baby products such as pram, baby carrier and baby cot.
description: Description: The rattle set can meet your different needs. Gently shakes to make a sound without being too loud or annoying to encourage your baby's exploration, get baby's attention and keep them from crying. Squeeze rattles can be used to make soft toys sound again, and can also be sewn into baby rattles, dolls, soft toys, etc. Specifications: Material of the rattle ball/box, toy squeaker: PVC. Colour: white, transparent. Box contents: 8 pieces 2.7 cm/1.05 inch squealer squeaker Pack of 8 1.7 cm transparent rattle balls. Pack of 8 2.4 cm / 0.95 inches white rattle balls. Pack of 8 1.5 cm/0.6 inch rattle boxes.
